requiredEvidence.evidence: The independent repository contains the Tools package, its release infrastructure, and a fresh lockfile.

The independent repository passed typecheck, 29 files / 279 tests, reproducible build, 24/24 upstream completeness and adapter fixtures, source/packed 344/344, packed install, 14-Tool Pi activation, local publish-path regression and supply-chain verification for pi-leetcode-tools@0.1.3.

GitHub Actions push run 29695525569 and pull-request run 29695553418 passed the complete release pipeline for record f753a7ec... on Windows and Ubuntu with Node 22.19.0 and Node 24, including the corrected bootstrap and regular protected local-tgz publish boundaries.

Both protected workflows now publish explicit ./ local tgz paths. The static gate validates bootstrap and regular publish jobs, includes 12 negative checks, and a real npm --dry-run regression passed for the downloaded bootstrap-bundle and release-bundle layouts.

The controlled 0.1.2 to 0.1.3 rebind changes packageVersion values, generated version metadata, package documentation and release-only workflow verification. Schema, behavior, capability and resource digests; contract/protocol versions; the 14-Tool surface; upstream semantics; runtime logic and all regional adapters remain unchanged. The sole runtime-source difference is the PACKAGE_VERSION constant. The new exact artifact passed 29/279 tests and packed activation with packageVersion 0.1.3, so the prior public reads 6/6, Global full-safe 19 passed / 0 failed / 0 blocked / 7 skipped, and CN full-safe 21 passed / 0 failed / 0 blocked / 5 skipped remain cross-version remote-behavior evidence rather than exact-artifact live evidence.

The separately authorized CN interactive Pi UI flow passed 8/8 with lc_run Accepted, operation recovery Accepted, revision-bound Notes write, and lc_submit Accepted. Preserved evidence SHA-256 f82937d8... stores no credentials, raw code or Notes text, raw slug, or raw operation IDs; sensitive values are represented by hashes, byte counts and normalized outcomes alongside non-sensitive version, environment, tool and count metadata. The controlled version-only rebind is accepted because the write adapters, confirmation semantics and behavior/capability/resource digests are unchanged; the sole runtime-source difference is the PACKAGE_VERSION constant, and the new packed artifact independently passed the complete automated write-adapter and Pi activation suites.

invalidationConditions: the independent package-lock, source closure, release scripts or packed files change
the contract tuple, upstream mapping or exact artifact bytes change

requiredEvidence.evidence: main and immutable tag pi-leetcode-tools-v0.1.3 identify commit b9f597b589ff986c55671d52616e455e52d0d288. Tag CI run 29696017014 and release dry-run 29696151085 passed. Active ruleset 19161906 protects refs/tags/pi-leetcode-tools-v* against deletion and non-fast-forward updates.

https://www.npmjs.com/package/pi-leetcode-tools/v/0.1.3 exposes the exact approved 320579-byte / 162-file tgz. SHA-256 is 911bee92100bb33f5fdb68d91a1e8f47ab3373be9af43560fcccbfa3c78d160a and npm integrity is sha512-vbNQWPVImKQ4sxQnKg4G5d5Y2CzFYGhZAl3Fz0/4ims19xMuyMXiHDchGXY4IjxHGmdsBqJ8t2Y4MK5gshSKrg==. Both next and npm-initialized latest point to 0.1.3.

npm SLSA provenance binds refs/tags/pi-leetcode-tools-v0.1.3, commit b9f597b589ff986c55671d52616e455e52d0d288, bootstrap-tools.yml and the exact registry tarball. Sigstore transparency-log index is 2202596094; npm audit signatures passed with no invalid or missing entries.

The corrected credential-free verifier re-downloaded byte-identical registry content, performed a lifecycle-disabled clean install, matched all 162 installed files to CandidateRecord content digest sha256:7db3cb3fd4a76c3b2e76daa7f07c0aeba5f097f4321d0e26ff2fdce58b1ca04b, and activated 14/14 Pi tools through a closed allowlist registry. PR 4 push run 29697570847 and pull-request run 29697573175 passed Windows and Ubuntu on Node 22.19.0 and Node 24.

npm trust relationship 14250bf8-aa81-4b65-9c1b-015f716a7c5f is type github, repository Li7777777/pi-leetcode-tools, file release-tools.yml, environment npm-tools-next, with createPackage permission. The committed regular release workflow remains OIDC-only and rejects NPM_TOKEN.

GitHub environment secret NPM_TOKEN was deleted, bootstrap-tools.yml was disabled after the one-time publication, and temporary npm tokens leet and leet2fa were revoked. The final leet2fa whoami probe returned unauthorized after revocation.

GitHub Release https://github.com/Li7777777/pi-leetcode-tools/releases/tag/pi-leetcode-tools-v0.1.3 publishes the exact tgz together with SHA256SUMS, CycloneDX SBOM, supply-chain evidence, bootstrap registry verification and Pi activation evidence.

attemptHistory.reason: npm interpreted bootstrap-bundle/pi-leetcode-tools-0.1.2.tgz as a Git locator because the protected publish input lacked an explicit ./ local path prefix
The first 0.1.3 bootstrap secret write included a trailing newline, so npm rejected an illegal HTTP header after emitting provenance at transparency-log index 2202522560
Windows PowerShell Process.StandardInput.Write prefixed the replacement secret with UTF-8 BOM EFBBBF, so npm again rejected an illegal HTTP header after provenance index 2202577511

The protected publish job succeeded and emitted provenance index 2202596094. The original post-publish job failed because direct Node invocation omitted npm_execpath; the corrected npm-script verifier subsequently passed exact bytes, provenance, clean install, signature audit, Pi activation and initial dist-tags.

invalidationConditions: pi-leetcode-tools@0.1.3 is deprecated, unpublished or its dist-tags move away from the recorded release state
the immutable source tag, CandidateRecord, registry bytes, npm provenance or GitHub Release assets no longer agree
the npm Trusted Publisher or protected npm-tools-next environment is removed or broadened
